name: Cosmetics and personal care category overlay
change_note: Migrated from script CATEGORY_CHECKLIST into a composable category overlay.
checklist_hints: INCI ingredient list, claims, responsible person/local representative, safety assessment, and notification/registration needs are checked.
Sunscreen, acne, whitening, anti-dandruff, or therapeutic claims are routed for classification review.
GMP, microbiology, heavy metals, and preservative evidence are requested when relevant.

requirements.requirement: Verify cosmetics classification, responsible person/local representative, notification/registration, safety assessment, and ingredient restrictions for the destination market.
evidence_expected: safety assessment or notification evidence where required
requirements.decision_effect: Cannot approve cosmetics cases until classification and mandatory market entry route are verified.
requirements.notes: Sunscreen, whitening, acne, anti-dandruff, hair growth, therapeutic, or SPF claims can change classification.

requirements.requirement: Check cosmetic label language, ingredients, warnings, responsible entity, shelf-life, and product claims against market and platform rules.
requirements.decision_effect: Unsupported medical or functional claims require more information or escalation.
requirements.notes: Do not rely only on applicant marketing copy for claim classification.

sources.title: ASEAN: Agreement on the ASEAN Harmonised Cosmetic Regulatory Scheme
sources.confirms: ASEAN cosmetic regulation is harmonised through the ASEAN Cosmetic Directive framework, while implementation still depends on member-country authorities.

sources.title: Singapore HSA: Cosmetic products
sources.confirms: Singapore requires cosmetic products to meet safety, quality, claims, ingredient, notification, and responsible-person obligations before supply.

sources.title: Malaysia NPRA: Cosmetic Notification
sources.confirms: Malaysia requires cosmetic products to be notified to NPRA before manufacture, import, supply, or sale in Malaysia.

gaps: Seed overlay: verify destination-market cosmetics regulator requirements per case.
